22.dv: akin to H3212 (יָלַךְ); a primitive root;

22.gl: a number, definite (arithmetical) or indefinite (large, innumerable; small, a few); also (abstractly) narration
22.kj: [phrase] abundance, account, [idiom] all, [idiom] few, (in-) finite, (certain) number(-ed), tale, telling, [phrase] time.

22.gl: a year (as a revolution of time)
a well-trodden road (literally or figuratively); also a caravan
22.kj: manner, path, race, rank, traveller, troop, (by-, high-) way.

22.dv: or אָתָא; a primitive root (collateral to H225 (אוּת) contraction);
